parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
boundary index.jsp
boundary basket.jsp
participant Order
participant Pay
participant LogicFacade
participant OrderMapper
database Database

note right of User
We assume user
is logged in
end note

User -> index.jsp : user clicks "add to cart"
index.jsp -> Order : [for each cupcake] AddToOrder()
Order -> index.jsp : redirect (msg "added to basket")
index.jsp -> User : display msg

User -> index.jsp : user clicks "show basket"
index.jsp -> basket.jsp : ShowBasket()
basket.jsp -> Pay : Pay()

Pay -> Pay : Check date
Pay -> Pay : Check if logged in
Pay -> Pay : Check balance

Pay -> LogicFacade : saveOrder()
LogicFacade -> OrderMapper : saveOrder()
OrderMapper -> Database : saves order
Database -> OrderMapper : return
OrderMapper -> Pay : return

Pay -> index.jsp : redirect (msg "order placed")
index.jsp -> User : display msg

@enduml
```
